final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: social media avatar, universal platform compatibility
Primary request: minimalist geometric logo combining electric vehicle silhouette, circuit/digital pattern, and lifestyle leaf element
Scene/backdrop: clean white or subtle gradient background, no cultural symbols or religious imagery
Subject: abstract modern icon merging EV charging plug shape with tech circuit lines and organic leaf curve, balanced symmetry
Style/medium: flat vector illustration, clean line art, contemporary tech aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered icon with generous padding, scalable for 1:1 crop
Lighting/mood: neutral, approachable, professional and friendly
Color palette: electric blue + forest green + warm gray, no red/yellow dominance to avoid regional sensitivities
Materials/textures: smooth vector surfaces, no photorealistic textures
Constraints: no human figures, no flags, no religious symbols, no hand gestures, no animal depictions, culturally neutral design
Avoid: cultural appropriation, religious imagery, political symbols, realistic faces, complex details that lose clarity at small sizes
